response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 15+ years of experience as a Senior/Staff engineer at major companies. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and architecture skills align well with the stack, but seniority mismatch creates risk of retention issues, salary expectations gap, and potential dissatisfaction with entry-level responsibilities. PostgreSQL experience is not explicitly shown (MongoDB/MySQL listed), and on-site presence in Berlin needs confirmation.
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React fullstack experience across multiple senior roles
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
Based in Berlin with relevant AI/LLM tooling exposure from recent Naver role
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for junior/mid role
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB instead)
Likely salary expectations and engagement risk for entry-level position
